summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V2 Enhancement features: Mapping Completeness, Rate Push Tracking, Health Trend Analytics, and WebSocket real-time updates. All 84 unit tests pass (42 in test_v2_integration.py + 42 in test_production_hardening.py), 15 new API tests pass, and all 3 new frontend tabs render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. WebSocket endpoint confirmed working with ping/pong.
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints follow REST conventions with proper authentication
Mapping Completeness service correctly validates room, rate plan, occupancy, tax mode, meal plan mappings
Rate Push Tracking service provides success/failure rates with failure classification breakdown
Health Trend service provides daily/weekly trends with delta comparison in summary
WebSocket endpoint accepts connections and responds to ping/pong correctly
Frontend tabs use proper data-testid attributes throughout for testing
Score ring component in Mapping Readiness tab correctly visualizes readiness percentage
All tabs include connector selector with refresh/validate buttons
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing connector 'Test HC2'
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 Enhancement features fully tested. All new tabs working: Health Trends (shows metric cards and trend charts), Mapping Readiness (shows score ring, sync/import gates, per-type checks), Rate Push (shows KPI cards and summary). WebSocket 'Live' indicator shows real-time connection status. API tests saved to test_v2_new_endpoints_api.py. Note: No historical trend data available for Test HC2 connector (shows 'No trend data available' messages) - this is expected for newly created connectors.
passed_tests: 84 unit tests in test_v2_integration.py + test_production_hardening.py pass
GET /api/channel-manager/v2/health-trend/{connector_id}/summary returns trend summary with delta
UI: Health Trends tab renders with connector selector, 5 metric cards, trend charts
UI: Mapping Readiness tab renders with score ring, sync/import gates, 5 check items
UI: Rate Push tab renders with 4 KPI cards and summary section
UI: WebSocket 'Live' indicator showing in Admin Panel header

health_trends_tab.data: 5 metric cards (Health Score, Sync Success, Import Success, Alerts, Retries), Daily/Weekly trend sections

mapping_readiness_tab.data: Score ring (0/100), Sync Gate Blocked, Import Gate Manual Review, 5 check items (Room Type, Rate Plan, Occupancy, Tax Mode, Meal Plan)

rate_push_tab.data: 4 KPI cards (Success Rate 0%, Failure Rate 0%, Total Retries 0, Avg Latency 0ms), Summary section

websocket_status.data: Shows 'Live' indicator in top-right of Admin Panel header
